root.name: Add a hyperlink on the word 'HSC' on slide 19 that links to slide 1
root.description: Evaluates whether a hyperlink has been correctly added to the word 'HSC' on slide 19, with the hyperlink pointing to slide 1, and penalizes extraneous or incorrect changes.

children.name: Hyperlink presence on 'HSC' in slide 19
children.description: Checks that the word 'HSC' on slide 19 has a hyperlink applied to it.

children.name: Hyperlink destination points to slide 1
children.description: Checks that the hyperlink applied to 'HSC' on slide 19 points to slide 1.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides or content
children.description: Ensures that no unintended modifications (animations, transitions, slides, or other hyperlinks) were introduced elsewhere in the presentation.
